**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Limit nested control-flow complexity.

## Bad

```go
if ready {
	for _, item := range items {
		if valid(item) { process(item) }
	}
}
```

## Good

```go
if !ready { return }
process()
```
